free_text: Reevaluation of secondary neutron spectra from thick
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
T.Kurosawa+, Data of Ar, Fe, Xe and Si beam before
T.Kurosawa+, Data of Ne beam before revision
T.Kurosawa+, Data of He and C beam before revision
To determine kinetic energies of neutrons
C (400 MeV/A)+C and Si (800MeV/A)+C are new
measurements by D.Satoh et al. (2007). Other data are
originally measured by T.Kurosawa et al. (1999,2000)
and revised by D.Satoh et al.(2007).
On. Received by e-mail from D.Satoh
